children.label: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.name: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COADM1AO

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COADM1AO
                   PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-MENU-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.name:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.originalText:
IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COADM1AO
                   PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-MENU-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COADM1AO
                   PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-MENU-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.name:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.originalText:
IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COADM1AO
                   PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-MENU-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF

children.label: _DIALECT_1​​​​
children.name: _DIALECT_1​​​​
children.originalText:
_DIALECT_ 1 ​​​​ ​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​
       
           SET ERR-FLG-OFF TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COADM1AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COADM1AO
                   PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-MENU-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 2 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.

children.label: PERFORM VARYING WS-IDX
children.name: PERFORMVARYINGW
children.originalText:
PERFORM VARYING WS-IDX
                   FROM LENGTH OF OPTIONI OF COADM1AI BY -1 UNTIL
                   OPTIONI OF COADM1AI(WS-IDX:1) NOT = SPACES OR
                   WS-IDX = 1
           END-PERFORM

children.label: MOVEOPTIONIOFCO
children.name: MOVEOPTIONIOFCO
children.originalText: MOVE OPTIONI OF COADM1AI(1:WS-IDX) TO WS-OPTION-X

children.label: MOVEWS-OPTIONTO
children.name: MOVEWS-OPTIONTO
children.originalText: MOVE WS-OPTION                TO OPTIONO OF COADM1AO

children.label: MOVE'Please ent
children.name: MOVE'Please ent
children.originalText:
MOVE 'Please enter a valid option number...' TO
                                       WS-MESSAGE

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
               MOVE 'Please enter a valid option number...' TO
                                       WS-MESSAGE
               PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN

children.label:
IS 
WS-OPTION IS NOT NUMERIC OR
            ?
children.name:
IS 
WS-OPTION IS NOT NUMERIC OR
            ?
children.originalText:
IF WS-OPTION IS NOT NUMERIC OR
              WS-OPTION > CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-COUNT OR
              WS-OPTION = ZEROS
               MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
               MOVE 'Please enter a valid option number...' TO
                                       WS-MESSAGE
               PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
           END-IF

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
                   MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
                   MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
                   _DIALECT_ 3 ​​​​ ​​​​
                       ​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   ​​​​​​​​

children.label:
IS 
CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-PGMNAME(WS-OPTION)(1:5) ?
children.name:
IS 
CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-PGMNAME(WS-OPTION)(1:5) ?
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-PGMNAME(WS-OPTION)(1:5) NOT = 'DUMMY'
                   MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
                   MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
                   MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
                   _DIALECT_ 3 ​​​​ ​​​​
                       ​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   ​​​​​​​​
               END-IF

children.label: MOVEDFHGREENTOE
children.name: MOVEDFHGREENTOE
children.originalText: MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COADM1AO

children.label: STRING'This opt
children.name: STRING'This opt
children.originalText:
STRING 'This option '       DELIMITED BY SIZE
       
       
                       'is not installed ...'   DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-MESSAGE

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-PGMNAME(WS-OPTION)(1:5) NOT = 'DUMMY'
                   MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
                   MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
                   MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
                   _DIALECT_ 3 ​​​​ ​​​​
                       ​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   ​​​​​​​​
               END-IF
               MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
               MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COADM1AO
               STRING 'This option '       DELIMITED BY SIZE
       
       
                       'is not installed ...'   DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-MESSAGE
               PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               IF CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-PGMNAME(WS-OPTION)(1:5) NOT = 'DUMMY'
                   MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
                   MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
                   MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
                   _DIALECT_ 3 ​​​​ ​​​​
                       ​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   ​​​​​​​​
               END-IF
               MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
               MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COADM1AO
               STRING 'This option '       DELIMITED BY SIZE
       
       
                       'is not installed ...'   DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-MESSAGE
               PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
           END-IF

children.label: PERFORMVARYINGW
children.name: PERFORMVARYINGW
children.originalText:
PERFORM VARYING WS-IDX
                   FROM LENGTH OF OPTIONI OF COADM1AI BY -1 UNTIL
                   OPTIONI OF COADM1AI(WS-IDX:1) NOT = SPACES OR
                   WS-IDX = 1
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE OPTIONI OF COADM1AI(1:WS-IDX) TO WS-OPTION-X
           INSPECT WS-OPTION-X REPLACING ALL ' ' BY '0'
           MOVE WS-OPTION-X              TO WS-OPTION
           MOVE WS-OPTION                TO OPTIONO OF COADM1AO
       
           IF WS-OPTION IS NOT NUMERIC OR
              WS-OPTION > CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-COUNT OR
              WS-OPTION = ZEROS
               MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
               MOVE 'Please enter a valid option number...' TO
                                       WS-MESSAGE
               PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
           END-IF
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               IF CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-PGMNAME(WS-OPTION)(1:5) NOT = 'DUMMY'
                   MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
                   MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
                   MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
                   _DIALECT_ 3 ​​​​ ​​​​
                       ​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   ​​​​​​​​
               END-IF
               MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
               MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COADM1AO
               STRING 'This option '       DELIMITED BY SIZE
       
       
                       'is not installed ...'   DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-MESSAGE
               PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
           END-IF.

children.label:
IS 
CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES?
children.name:
IS 
CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES?
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF

children.label: IFCDEMO-TO-PROG
children.name: IFCDEMO-TO-PROG
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           _DIALECT_ 4 ​​​​ ​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.

children.label: MOVEWS-MESSAGET
children.name: MOVEWS-MESSAGET
children.originalText: MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COADM1AO

children.label: PERFORMPOPULATE
children.name: PERFORMPOPULATE
children.originalText:
PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
           PERFORM BUILD-MENU-OPTIONS
       
           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COADM1AO
       
           _DIALECT_ 5 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.

children.label: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.name: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.originalText: MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COADM1AO

children.label: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.name: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.originalText: MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COADM1AO

children.label: MOVEWS-TRANIDTO
children.name: MOVEWS-TRANIDTO
children.originalText: MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COADM1AO

children.label: MOVEWS-PGMNAMET
children.name: MOVEWS-PGMNAMET
children.originalText: MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COADM1AO

children.label: MOVEWS-CURDATE-
children.name: MOVEWS-CURDATE-
children.originalText: MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COADM1AO

children.label: MOVEWS-CURTIME-
children.name: MOVEWS-CURTIME-
children.originalText: MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COADM1AO

children.label: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.name: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.originalText:
MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COADM1AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COADM1AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COADM1AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COADM1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COADM1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COADM1AO.

children.label: STRINGCDEMO-ADM
children.name: STRINGCDEMO-ADM
children.originalText:
STRING CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-NUM(WS-IDX)  DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      '. '                         DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-NAME(WS-IDX) DELIMITED BY SIZE
                 INTO WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE WS-IDX
                   WHEN 1
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN001O
                   WHEN 2
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN002O
                   WHEN 3
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN003O
                   WHEN 4
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN004O
                   WHEN 5
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN005O
                   WHEN 6
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN006O
                   WHEN 7
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN007O
                   WHEN 8
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN008O
                   WHEN 9
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN009O
                   WHEN 10
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN010O
                   WHEN OTHER
                       CONTINUE
               END-EVALUATE

children.label: PERFORM VARYING WS-IDX FROM 1
children.name: PERFORMVARYINGW
children.originalText:
PERFORM VARYING WS-IDX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL
                           WS-IDX > CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-COUNT
       
               MOVE SPACES             TO WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT
       
               STRING CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-NUM(WS-IDX)  DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      '. '                         DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-NAME(WS-IDX) DELIMITED BY SIZE
                 INTO WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT
       
               EVALUATE WS-IDX
                   WHEN 1
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN001O
                   WHEN 2
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN002O
                   WHEN 3
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN003O
                   WHEN 4
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN004O
                   WHEN 5
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN005O
                   WHEN 6
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN006O
                   WHEN 7
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN007O
                   WHEN 8
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN008O
                   WHEN 9
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN009O
                   WHEN 10
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN010O
                   WHEN OTHER
                       CONTINUE
               END-EVALUATE
       
           END-PERFORM

children.label: PERFORMVARYINGW
children.name: PERFORMVARYINGW
children.originalText:
PERFORM VARYING WS-IDX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL
                           WS-IDX > CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-COUNT
       
               MOVE SPACES             TO WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT
       
               STRING CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-NUM(WS-IDX)  DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      '. '                         DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-NAME(WS-IDX) DELIMITED BY SIZE
                 INTO WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT
       
               EVALUATE WS-IDX
                   WHEN 1
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN001O
                   WHEN 2
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN002O
                   WHEN 3
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN003O
                   WHEN 4
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN004O
                   WHEN 5
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN005O
                   WHEN 6
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN006O
                   WHEN 7
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN007O
                   WHEN 8
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN008O
                   WHEN 9
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN009O
                   WHEN 10
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN010O
                   WHEN OTHER
                       CONTINUE
               END-EVALUATE
       
           END-PERFORM.

children.label: MOVEDFHGREENTOE
children.name: MOVEDFHGREENTOE
children.originalText: MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COADM1AO

children.label: STRING'This opt
children.name: STRING'This opt
children.originalText:
STRING 'This option '       DELIMITED BY SIZE
       
       
                       'is not installed ...'   DELIMITED BY SIZE
           INTO WS-MESSAGE

children.label: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.name: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
           MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COADM1AO
           STRING 'This option '       DELIMITED BY SIZE
       
       
                       'is not installed ...'   DELIMITED BY SIZE
           INTO WS-MESSAGE
       
           PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
           _DIALECT_ 7 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
           .

label: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/4bae37b9-accc-489a-856e-b50b181570e4
name: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/4bae37b9-accc-489a-856e-b50b181570e4
originalText:
MAIN-PARA.
       
           _DIALECT_ 1 ​​​​ ​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​
       
           SET ERR-FLG-OFF TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COADM1AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COADM1AO
                   PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-MENU-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 2 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       PROCESS-ENTER-KEY.
       
           PERFORM VARYING WS-IDX
                   FROM LENGTH OF OPTIONI OF COADM1AI BY -1 UNTIL
                   OPTIONI OF COADM1AI(WS-IDX:1) NOT = SPACES OR
                   WS-IDX = 1
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE OPTIONI OF COADM1AI(1:WS-IDX) TO WS-OPTION-X
           INSPECT WS-OPTION-X REPLACING ALL ' ' BY '0'
           MOVE WS-OPTION-X              TO WS-OPTION
           MOVE WS-OPTION                TO OPTIONO OF COADM1AO
       
           IF WS-OPTION IS NOT NUMERIC OR
              WS-OPTION > CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-COUNT OR
              WS-OPTION = ZEROS
               MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
               MOVE 'Please enter a valid option number...' TO
                                       WS-MESSAGE
               PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
           END-IF
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               IF CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-PGMNAME(WS-OPTION)(1:5) NOT = 'DUMMY'
                   MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
                   MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
                   MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
                   _DIALECT_ 3 ​​​​ ​​​​
                       ​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   ​​​​​​​​
               END-IF
               MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
               MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COADM1AO
               STRING 'This option '       DELIMITED BY SIZE
       
       
                       'is not installed ...'   DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  INTO WS-MESSAGE
               PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
           END-IF.
       
       
       
       
       RETURN-TO-SIGNON-SCREEN.
       
           IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           _DIALECT_ 4 ​​​​ ​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       SEND-MENU-SCREEN.
       
           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
           PERFORM BUILD-MENU-OPTIONS
       
           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COADM1AO
       
           _DIALECT_ 5 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       RECEIVE-MENU-SCREEN.
       
           _DIALECT_ 6 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       POPULATE-HEADER-INFO.
       
           MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COADM1AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COADM1AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COADM1AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COADM1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COADM1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COADM1AO.
       
       
       
       
       BUILD-MENU-OPTIONS.
       
           PERFORM VARYING WS-IDX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL
                           WS-IDX > CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-COUNT
       
               MOVE SPACES             TO WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT
       
               STRING CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-NUM(WS-IDX)  DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      '. '                         DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      CDEMO-ADMIN-OPT-NAME(WS-IDX) DELIMITED BY SIZE
                 INTO WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT
       
               EVALUATE WS-IDX
                   WHEN 1
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN001O
                   WHEN 2
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN002O
                   WHEN 3
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN003O
                   WHEN 4
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN004O
                   WHEN 5
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN005O
                   WHEN 6
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN006O
                   WHEN 7
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN007O
                   WHEN 8
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN008O
                   WHEN 9
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN009O
                   WHEN 10
                       MOVE WS-ADMIN-OPT-TXT TO OPTN010O
                   WHEN OTHER
                       CONTINUE
               END-EVALUATE
       
           END-PERFORM.
       
       
       
       PGMIDERR-ERR-PARA.
           MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
           MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COADM1AO
           STRING 'This option '       DELIMITED BY SIZE
       
       
                       'is not installed ...'   DELIMITED BY SIZE
           INTO WS-MESSAGE
       
           PERFORM SEND-MENU-SCREEN
           _DIALECT_ 7 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
           .
